---

title: "Age Distribution"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# Load the data
data <- read_csv("all_world_cup_2026_squads.csv")

# Inspect the first few rows
head(data)
```

```{r}
# Create a histogram of age

ggplot(data, aes(x = age)) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 30,
    color = "black",
    fill = "steelblue"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Age",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
